titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Elizabethan Club, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Manuscripts and Archives Staff

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:03

did.abstract: The records consist of minutes of meetings, financial papers, correspondence, membership lists, sketches, video recordings of the Maynard Mack lecture series, and portraits of the Elizabethan Club at Yale. Included are records of the club librarian, the club chairman, and the chair of incorporators.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 40 (YRG 40), Records of Yale clubs, societies and organizations.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were a gift of the Elizabethan Club, 1978, 1980, 1999, 2007, 2013-2014.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. Written permission from the Librarian of the Elizabethan Club is required.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has been transferred to Yale University.

Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives.
Copies of commercially produced audiovisual materials contained in this collection cannot be made for researcher use outside of the repository.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Elizabethan Club, Yale University, Records (RU 36). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged alphabetically by type of material, followed by new accessions.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Elizabethan Club was founded in 1911 when Alexander Cochran donated the clubhouse and Elizabethan collections to Yale University. The club provides a setting for students and faculty to share tea while discussing literature.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of minutes of meetings, financial papers, correspondence, membership lists, sketches, video recordings of the Maynard Mack lecture series, and portraits of the Elizabethan Club at Yale. Included are records of the club librarian, the club chairman, and the chair of incorporators.

did.unittitle: General material, including related correspondence (many years missing)
Admission of women to membership, correspondence and straw vote material
Incorporators, includes correspondence, deed of conveyance for 123 College St., printed ephemera, minutes, and other club management documents
Lists of board members, includes membership on various committees
Meeting material, includes related correspondence, and after 1930, various committee reports submitted to the Annual Meeting

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

odd.head: General
odd.p: See also: Publications, Shakespeare census, box 5, folders 236-238

did.unittitle: Cochran, Alexander Smith, correspondence and typescripts of newspaper articles
Osborn, Bob, sketch of Shakespeare on wood panel and accompanying note
Signet Society, seventieth anniversary printed ephemera
Sizer, Theodore, correspondence and photograph detailing a panel showing Queen Elizabeth I's coat of arms
X-radiographs of the club's portrait of Queen Elizabeth I before restoration
Annual dinner, correspondence and printed ephemera
Bé, Kenneth, lute recital co-sponsored by Elizabethan Club at the Beinecke Library, Yale University, compact disc (CD-R)
Exhibit in Sterling Memorial Library to commemorate the accession of Queen Elizabeth I, exhibit labels
Correspondence and membership lists relating to club's financial predicament

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: Giroux, Robert, research project on "The Book Known as Q"
Books on deposit at Yale University Library
Logan Project, bibliographic notes and correspondence, includes Eugene Waith files
Notecards containing notes from Andrew Keogh's office, and information about club members
Notecards containing notes from Andrew Keogh's office, and information about club members
Elizabethan Club catalogue, correspondence, proofs, and research material
Shakespeare Census, correspondence and printed ephemera
Troxell, Gilbert, The Elizabethan Club: Its Origins and Its Books , publication and notes
Yale Shakespeare, correspondence and printed ephemera
Maynard Mack lectures and news footage of the Elizabethan Club [videorecordings]

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

did.unittitle: "Positively Connecticut," Yale Elizabethan Club, Action News (WTNH-TV), commercially produced videotape (VHS)
Arthur Miller in conversation with Murray Biggs
Claire Bloom in conversation with Murray Biggs
Edward Albee in conversation with Murray Biggs

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: As a preservation measure, original materials may not be used. Digital access copies must be provided for use. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access

did.unittitle: Records of Elias Clark, Chair of Incorporators
Gilder, Pittman, Shakespeare bust and garden benches
Poster listing deceased World War I servicemen from the Elizabethan Club
Poster listing deceased World War I servicemen from the Elizabethan Club
